title: Operate as a self-contained local analytics module
description: Complete every supported INSIGHTS workflow inside the existing Tally process without a network or background lifecycle.
target: 100% of INSIGHTS acceptance workflows complete with network access disabled, non-interactively, and with no INSIGHTS or Tally daemon, watcher, scheduler, service, listener, queue, cloud model, or background process running before, during, or after invocation.
load_condition: Discovery, Generate, Retain, Restate, Explain, Get, List, Status, Delete, private policy validation, Backup, Verify, Restore, expected failure, cancellation, and crash-recovery workflows.
measurement: Network-namespace or firewall isolation, socket and process inspection, child-process tracking, repeated one-shot invocation, and post-operation resource cleanup assertions.
rationale: Explicit local operation preserves privacy, deployment simplicity, and the accepted complexity boundary.
